item.description:
# Clip 1.3.1
Clip 1.3.1 fixes native Live Share invite and Friend joins.
## Live Share
- Accept the host's signed native session descriptor after the peer-to-peer control channel opens instead of incorrectly reporting that the Live Share server returned an invalid message. - Apply the fix to both complete-invite joins and saved-Friend joins.
The Live Share server does not need to be updated for this fix. A 1.3.1 viewer can join a host running Clip 1.3.0 or later.
## Requirements and first launch
Clip requires macOS 15 or later on Apple silicon.
This build is Apple Development signed rather than Developer ID signed and notarized. A direct browser download may therefore require **Open Anyway** in **System Settings → Privacy & Security**.
